headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -80.2)
key_insights: Frustrations trending down 41% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 124 quotes and 90 at strong intensity, though the score dropped significantly from yesterday's peak.
• Optimism hits near its 61-day low at -49.7, showing people are struggling to find positive sentiment despite 87 quotes.
• Fears remain quiet with a negative score, suggesting this category isn't driving much conversation today.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
